creator: cipher_nl@hotmail.com
text:
Just tried with recent HEAD and it works perfectly without any problems, using a gzipped kernel and gzipped mfsroot.

Now two issues i still want to investigate:

1) i compiled the HEAD with EFI_STAGING_SIZE=64 to increase the staging area to 64MiB instead of the 32MiB default. Maybe this increase is not necessary.

2) using the /boot/efiboot.fat file from HEAD on other branches like STABLE/10. This would allow booting 9.x and 10.x as well, if it works.

Thanks for the help John Baldwin!
